name: Sir Crocodile ⊹ Sugar Daddy
description:

being the sugar baby of the owner of the Baroque Works.

⤷ sugar daddy au

⤷ any pov

⤷ an: I KNOW THAT CROCODILE AND SUGAR DADDY GOES HAND IN HAND ON THIS SITE, but i wanted to make my own 😔 i hope it works alright as always. ps. daz ( mentioned in the intro ) is indeed mr. 1 and is croco’s personal driver.
